kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09D. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09D" and put them into a temporary table called J09D_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". Additionally, any house where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0 should always be set to "EVU" regardless of the count.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

Export the final result as a CSV file named "J09D" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

Send the CSV to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT
  d."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  d.HAUS,
  d.ANLAGE,
  d.ME_MA_ID,
  d.EQUNR,
  d.HOUSE_NUM1
FROM decision_table d
JOIN eabl e ON d.EQUNR = e.EQUNR
JOIN eablg g ON e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT
  NULL AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  d.HAUS,
  d.ANLAGE,
  d.ME_MA_ID,
  d.EQUNR,
  d.HOUSE_NUM1
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';

CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT
  NULL AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  d.HAUS,
  d.ANLAGE,
  d.ME_MA_ID,
  d.EQUNR,
  d.HOUSE_NUM1
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

WITH eq_counts AS (
  SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
  FROM J09D_temp
  GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
  WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
  WHEN ec.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
  ELSE 'EVU'
END
FROM eq_counts ec
WHERE J09D_temp.HAUS = ec.HAUS;

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE J09D_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    t."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    t.HAUS,
    t.ANLAGE AS ANLAGE,
    t.ME_MA_ID,
    t.EQUNR,
    t.HOUSE_NUM1,
    t.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    d.POST_CODE1,
    d.CITY1,
    d.CITY2
  FROM J09D_temp t
  LEFT JOIN decision_table d
    ON t.HAUS = d.HAUS AND t.EQUNR = d.EQUNR AND t.ANLAGE = d.ANLAGE
),
joined AS (
  SELECT
    b."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    b.HAUS,
    b.ANLAGE,
    b.ME_MA_ID,
    b.EQUNR,
    b.HOUSE_NUM1,
    b.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    COALESCE(g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.") AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No._joined",
    b.POST_CODE1,
    b.CITY1,
    b.CITY2,
    sn.TITLE AS sales_TITLE,
    sn.FORENAME AS sales_FORENAME,
    sn.SURNAME AS sales_SURNAME,
    sn.STREET AS sales_STREET,
    sn.STREETNO AS sales_STREETNO,
    sn.POST_CODE1 AS sales_POST_CODE1,
    sn.CITY1 AS sales_CITY1,
    sn.CITY2 AS sales_CITY2,
    sn.EMAIL AS sales_EMAIL,
    nn.TITLE AS net_TITLE,
    nn.FORENAME AS net_FORENAME,
    nn.SURNAME AS net_SURNAME,
    nn.STREET AS net_STREET,
    nn.STREETNO AS net_STREETNO,
    nn.POST_CODE1 AS net_POST_CODE1,
    nn.CITY1 AS net_CITY1,
    nn.CITY2 AS net_CITY2,
    nn.EMAIL AS net_EMAIL
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN eabl e
    ON b.EQUNR = e.EQUNR
  LEFT JOIN eablg g
    ON e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
  LEFT JOIN sales_master sn
    ON b.EQUNR = sn.EQUNR
  LEFT JOIN net_master nn
    ON b.EQUNR = nn.EQUNR
)
SELECT
  COALESCE("Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No._joined", "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.") AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  HAUS,
  ANLAGE,
  ME_MA_ID,
  EQUNR,
  HOUSE_NUM1,
  ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  CASE WHEN sales_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN sales_TITLE ELSE net_TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN sales_FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN sales_FORENAME ELSE net_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN sales_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN sales_SURNAME ELSE net_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN sales_STREET IS NOT NULL THEN sales_STREET ELSE net_STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN sales_STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN sales_STREETNO ELSE net_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN sales_POST_CODE1 ELSE net_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE WHEN sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN sales_CITY1 ELSE net_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
  CASE WHEN sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN sales_CITY2 ELSE net_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
  CASE WHEN sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN sales_EMAIL ELSE net_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM joined;

args.sql_query:
SELECT
  "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  HAUS,
  ANLAGE,
  ME_MA_ID,
  EQUNR,
  HOUSE_NUM1,
  ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  TITLE,
  FORENAME,
  SURNAME,
  STREET,
  STREETNO,
  POST_CODE1,
  CITY1,
  CITY2,
  EMAIL
FROM J09D_enriched;

SELECT
  g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  t.HAUS,
  t.ANLAGE,
  t.ME_MA_ID,
  t.EQUNR,
  t.HOUSE_NUM1,
  t.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09D_temp t
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON t.ANLAGE = g.Installation
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR;

args.email:
Dear EVU team,

Please find attached the processed meter readings for tour J09D.

Best regards,
Meter Processing Automation

kwargs.content:
I have:

1. Selected all decision_table rows where TOUR starts with "J09D" into a temporary table J09D_temp and added the ENTSCHEIDUNG column.
2. Classified each house:
   - Counted distinct EQUNR per HAUS.
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU" if HOUSE_NUM1 = 0.
   - Otherwise set ENTSCHEIDUNG = "KSA" when count < 3, else "EVU".
3. Joined with EABLG via the installation/ANLAGE and brought in customer data from sales_master and net_master via EQUNR, preferring sales_master data when present (net_master fields used only when sales data is missing).
4. Exported the resulting dataset to a CSV named J09D.csv with the requested columns and sent it to meter.readings@evu.com.
5. Dropped the temporary table J09D_temp.

If you’d like, I can also summarize record counts (e.g., number of KSA vs EVU) for tour J09D.
